headline: Discovery blocked by access restrictions; audit folder located but contents not retrievable

findings.text: Official deployments doc: No access to website or GitHub documentation. Website fetch returned JavaScript-required page. GitHub raw content access denied.

Audit PDFs: Located audit directory at https://github.com/lista-dao/moolah/tree/master/docs/audits with 17 audit reports (Bailsec, Blocksec, Cantina, OpenZeppelin, Spearbit) covering ListaLending main, Provider, SlisBNBMinter, Credit, Loan, Liquidation, and Fixed Term modules. PDF fetch access denied.
Block-explorer searches: Attempted Etherscan and BscScan access denied by permission restrictions. Web searches did not return Lista Lending-specific contract addresses.
GitHub deployment artifacts: Repo accessible as listing only; raw JSON/markdown files (deployments, addresses lists) not accessible.

rationale.verdict: Discovery assessment incomplete. Found evidence that Lista Lending has extensive multi-chain contracts (evidenced by audit titles spanning Ethereum and Binance chains with complex module architecture) but cannot extract contract addresses, roles, or deployment configuration due to access restrictions on audit PDFs, GitHub raw content, block explorers, and documentation sites. The audit folder listing proves contracts exist but discovery checklist items D1–D4 cannot be completed without fetch access.

evidence.shows: GitHub audit directory listing showing 17 audit reports from Bailsec, Blocksec, Cantina, OpenZeppelin, and Spearbit covering ListaLending contracts including main protocol, Provider, SlisBNBMinter, Credit, Loan, Liquidation, and Fixed Term modules across multiple audit dates (April 2025 – March 2026)

unknowns: D1-offchain: Block-explorer name-tag search for Lista Lending on Ethereum, BSC blocked by permission restrictions; web search queries exhausted without returning contract addresses
D2-offchain: Official deployments documentation URL not accessible; lista.org website requires JavaScript execution; GitHub repo README/docs not fetchable
D3-offchain: Audit PDF contents not accessible; contract scope tables cannot be extracted
D4-offchain: GitHub Foundry broadcast/ and hardhat-deploy/ artifacts not accessible; deployment address lists not discovered
D5-offchain: Cross-chain enumeration cannot proceed without D1–D4 sources; chains=Binance,Ethereum but no addresses surfaced
D6-offchain: No factory contracts identified; child enumeration not possible
D7-offchain: No addresses catalogued; role taxonomy not applicable
D8-offchain: No addresses collected; integrity check not applicable
